reproduce_cmd: uv run python expt.py run --config-file conf/trip.yaml dataset.n=100 evaluate.expt_name=trip_react_engineered llm.model=together_ai/deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-V3 ptools.trip_planning.method=react_pydantic ptools.trip_planning.preamble=Answer the planning task using the available tools. Each tool has a docstring describing its purpose. After enough evidence, return your final plan as the structured output. Stop calling tools after producing the answer. ptools.trip_planning.tools=[ptools_trip.parse_trip_constraints,ptools_trip.find_valid_route,ptools_trip.build_trip_plan]
